name: mansion-bedroom-master
summary: The master bedchamber of a great house — a canopied bed against the far wall, a dressing area, a private hearth. Formal even in sleep.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: rectangle, bed on the long wall opposite the door

primary_palette.note: classic master — four-poster with curtains, matched nightstands
occupied master — dressing and warming corners are active
less grand but still noble — full bed, dressing area screened off
pious noble — the master sleeps beside their altar

story_prompts: the lord sleeps — curtains drawn, fire banked, one candle still burning
the bed has not been slept in tonight — covers turned back, the lord is elsewhere
mid-dressing — gown half-laid, the ladyship called away suddenly
the bed hides a compartment beneath the mattress — the estate's real papers live there
a sickroom — the master is dying, nurses' chairs added, a physician's kit by the bed

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: intimate low (0.25-0.4) — fireplace and bedside candles

anti_patterns: the bed is the anchor — against a wall, head to wall, NOT floating in the middle
nightstands come as a pair in a noble bedroom — symmetry is wealth
no working props — no desk piled with letters (that's the study), no weapons on racks
the room should feel DRESSED — every surface has something, but everything has a place
